reviews.review_title: Great game just lots of paywalls
reviews.review_description: So like I loved this game till they added premium then there was a cooldown for hitting only 10 balls and if there is toxic people you NEED PREMIUM TO GO TO A PRIVAT AREA and you have to wait like 10 days of doing daily quests just to get the cheapest bat whitch is flannel btw for me personally  I’d like the flannel bat because it’s Christmas and stuff so like I don’t need anymore bats ￼￼ anyway back to ranting about the game so if you’re fine with all of those problems above, go ahead get the game it’s free and you can hit absolute bombs and yeah also I can’t be fully sure on this but I think you can play baseball like a real baseball game

developer_response.body:
Hi NorthernAceXVii,

I appreciate your feedback. I have taken out a ton of the paywalls and you now can go to private codes entirely for free. I didn’t really know how a game should run when I started making it, so I apologize for those bad decisions in the past. I hope you try the latest version of the game because I think it really fixes a lot of the issues of the past.

I will continue making the game better for players like you.

Thank you,
Jordan
Cofounder & CEO, Throwback Studios

I love playing Derby Baseball because it is fun and exciting.
The game keeps me entertained every time I play it.
I like trying to hit home runs and score points.
The players and stadiums make the game feel realistic.
I enjoy competing against other people and improving my skills.
Derby Baseball is a great way to relax after school.
I also like the different challenges and game modes.
Playing with friends makes the game even more enjoyable.
The fast action keeps me focused and happy while playing.
Derby Baseball is one of my favorite games because it is always exciting and fun.

developer_response.body:
Hi Angry_man86,

I really appreciate your review and feedback!

I hear you and agree that the cooldown thing is super annoying. In the latest update, I actually took the cooldown out and it's gone for good!

Thank you so much for the great review and I hope to meet you in the game one day!

- Jordan The Owner

Baseball is one of the best sports because it combines skill, strategy, and excitement in every game. I love how every pitch can change the outcome, whether it’s a strikeout, a clutch hit, or a home run. The teamwork between pitchers, fielders, and hitters makes the game fun to watch and play. Even though games can be long sometimes, the intensity and big moments always make it worth it. If you enjoy sports that require talent, patience, and big-time plays, baseball is an amazing game.”
